parameters.jsCode:
const sqlLiteral = (value) => {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') return 'NULL';
  return "'" + String(value).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'";
};
const sqlInteger = (value) => {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') return 'NULL';
  const parsed = Number.parseInt(String(value), 10);
  return Number.isInteger(parsed) ? String(parsed) : 'NULL';
};
const item = $input.first()?.json ?? {};
const hasIdentifier = Boolean(item.member_id || item.member || item.venue_id || item.btn);
const itemCount = (item.regular_tags ?? 0) + (item.parent_tags ?? 0) + (item.key_tags ?? 0);
if (!hasIdentifier) {
  return [{ json: { sql: "select false as ok, 400 as response_code, 'Provide member_id, member, venue_id, or btn.'::text as message;" } }];
}
if (itemCount <= 0) {
  return [{ json: { sql: "select false as ok, 400 as response_code, 'At least one of regular_tags, parent_tags, or key_tags must be greater than zero.'::text as message;" } }];
}
return [{
  json: {
    sql: `WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    ${sqlInteger(item.member_id)}::bigint AS member_id,
    ${sqlLiteral(item.member)}::text AS member_name,
    ${sqlLiteral(item.membership)}::text AS membership_name,
    ${sqlLiteral(item.email_address)}::text AS member_email,
    ${sqlLiteral(item.venue_id)}::text AS venue_id,
    ${sqlLiteral(item.btn)}::text AS btn,
    ${sqlInteger(item.batch_id)}::bigint AS requested_batch_id,
    ${sqlLiteral(item.payer)}::text AS payer_override,
    ${sqlLiteral(item.address_1)}::text AS address_1_override,
    ${sqlLiteral(item.address_2)}::text AS address_2_override,
    ${sqlLiteral(item.address_3)}::text AS address_3_override,
    ${sqlLiteral(item.town)}::text AS town_override,
    ${sqlLiteral(item.postcode)}::text AS postcode_override,
    ${sqlInteger(item.regular_tags)}::integer AS regular_tags,
    ${sqlInteger(item.parent_tags)}::integer AS parent_tags,
    ${sqlInteger(item.key_tags)}::integer AS key_tags,
    ${sqlLiteral(item.notes)}::text AS notes,
    ${sqlLiteral(item.created_by)}::text AS created_by
), resolved_batch AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      p.requested_batch_id,
      (SELECT b.id FROM public.signup_batches b WHERE b.status = 'Processing' ORDER BY b.id DESC LIMIT 1)
    ) AS batch_id,
    p.requested_batch_id
  FROM params p
), candidate_member AS (
  SELECT
    m.id AS raw_member_id,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")) AS member_name,
    m."Venue ID" AS venue_id,
    m."British Tennis Number"::text AS btn,
    m."Email address" AS member_email,
    m."Membership" AS membership
  FROM public.raw_members m
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE coalesce(m.is_current, true) = true
    AND (
      (p.member_id IS NOT NULL AND m.id = p.member_id)
      OR (
        p.member_id IS NULL
        AND p.member_name IS NOT NULL
        AND lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) = lower(trim(p.member_name))
        AND (p.membership_name IS NULL OR p.membership_name = '' OR m."Membership" = p.membership_name)
        AND (p.member_email IS NULL OR p.member_email = '' OR public.normalize_match_email(m."Email address") = public.normalize_match_email(p.member_email))
      )
      OR (p.venue_id IS NOT NULL AND trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')) = trim(p.venue_id))
      OR (p.btn IS NOT NULL AND trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number"::text, '')) = trim(p.btn))
    )
  ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN p.member_id IS NOT NULL AND m.id = p.member_id THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    CASE WHEN p.member_name IS NOT NULL AND lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) = lower(trim(p.member_name)) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    CASE WHEN p.membership_name IS NOT NULL AND p.membership_name <> '' AND m."Membership" = p.membership_name THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    CASE WHEN p.member_email IS NOT NULL AND p.member_email <> '' AND public.normalize_match_email(m."Email address") = public.normalize_match_email(p.member_email) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    CASE WHEN p.venue_id IS NOT NULL AND trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')) = trim(p.venue_id) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    CASE WHEN p.btn IS NOT NULL AND trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number"::text, '')) = trim(p.btn) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    m.id
  LIMIT 1
), best_contact AS (
  SELECT bc.*
  FROM candidate_member cm
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL public.resolve_best_contact_row(
    cm.member_name,
    cm.member_email,
    NULLIF(regexp_replace(cm.member_name, '^\\S+\\s*', ''), ''),
    cm.membership ILIKE '%Family%'
  ) bc ON TRUE
  LIMIT 1
), chosen AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(p.member_name), ''), cm.member_name) AS member_name,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(p.payer_override), ''), bc.payer_name, cm.member_name) AS payer_name,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(p.member_email), ''), NULLIF(trim(bc.email_address), ''), NULLIF(trim(cm.member_email), '')) AS email_address,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(p.address_1_override), ''), NULLIF(trim(bc.address_1), '')) AS address_1,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(p.address_2_override), ''), NULLIF(trim(bc.address_2), '')) AS address_2,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(p.address_3_override), ''), NULLIF(trim(bc.address_3), '')) AS address_3,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(p.town_override), ''), NULLIF(trim(bc.town), '')) AS town,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(p.postcode_override), ''), NULLIF(trim(bc.postcode), '')) AS postcode,
    p.regular_tags,
    p.parent_tags,
    p.key_tags,
    p.notes,
    p.created_by
  FROM params p
  LEFT JOIN candidate_member cm ON true
  LEFT JOIN best_contact bc ON true
), validation AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN rb.batch_id IS NULL THEN 'No processing batch available and no batch_id was provided.'
      WHEN rb.requested_batch_id IS NOT NULL
       AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.signup_batches b WHERE b.id = rb.requested_batch_id)
      THEN format('Batch %s does not exist', rb.requested_batch_id)
      WHEN ch.member_name IS NULL OR trim(ch.member_name) = '' THEN 'Member could not be resolved.'
      WHEN COALESCE(ch.regular_tags, 0) + COALESCE(ch.parent_tags, 0) + COALESCE(ch.key_tags, 0) <= 0
      THEN 'At least one item count must be greater than zero.'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS error_message,
    rb.batch_id
  FROM resolved_batch rb
  CROSS JOIN chosen ch
), inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO public.signup_batch_manual_items (
    batch_id,
    member,
    payer,
    email_address,
    address_1,
    address_2,
    address_3,
    town,
    postcode,
    regular_tags,
    parent_tags,
    key_tags,
    notes,
    created_by,
    source
  )
  SELECT
    v.batch_id,
    ch.member_name,
    ch.payer_name,
    ch.email_address,
    ch.address_1,
    ch.address_2,
    ch.address_3,
    ch.town,
    ch.postcode,
    ch.regular_tags,
    ch.parent_tags,
    ch.key_tags,
    ch.notes,
    ch.created_by,
    'manual'
  FROM validation v
  CROSS JOIN chosen ch
  WHERE v.error_message IS NULL
  RETURNING id, batch_id, member, payer, regular_tags, parent_tags, key_tags, source
)
SELECT
  true AS ok,
  200 AS response_code,
  format('Added manual batch item %s to batch %s', id, batch_id) AS message,
  id,
  batch_id,
  member,
  payer,
  regular_tags,
  parent_tags,
  key_tags,
  source
FROM inserted
UNION ALL
SELECT
  false AS ok,
  400 AS response_code,
  error_message AS message,
  NULL::bigint AS id,
  batch_id,
  NULL::text AS member,
  NULL::text AS payer,
  NULL::integer AS regular_tags,
  NULL::integer AS parent_tags,
  NULL::integer AS key_tags,
  'manual'::text AS source
FROM validation
WHERE error_message IS NOT NULL;`,
  },
}];
